ddls:
CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "word_form" TEXT /* The form of the word (e.g., report) */,
  "starting_date" TEXT /* Starting date of the word usage in historical texts */,
  "pos" TEXT /* Part of speech of the word (e.g., noun, verb) */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the word has been used in the corpus */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the word (e.g., dictionary, historical text) */,
  "etymology" TEXT /* Brief etymology of the word */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the word entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the word (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "identifiers" (
  "identifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the word associated with this identifier */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* The identifier string linked to the word's meaning or usage */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the identifier is used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the identifier */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the identifier (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("identifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_identifiers_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the word associated with this category */,
  "category" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., semantic, syntactic) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the category */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parts_of_speech" (
  "pos_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the part of speech */,
  "pos_name" TEXT /* Name of the part of speech (e.g., noun, verb) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part of speech */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the part of speech */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the part of speech (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pos_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_stats" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the word used */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded usage */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the word was used on that date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the usage data (e.g., book, journal) */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context for the usage (e.g., academic, colloquial) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the usage stats */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_stats_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the historical period */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the historical period */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the historical period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the historical period (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, linguist, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access log (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thesaurus_entries" (
  "thesaurus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thesaurus entry */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the word associated with the synonym */,
  "synonym" TEXT /* The synonym or related term */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the synonym (e.g., dictionary, thesaurus) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the thesaurus entry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the thesaurus entry (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thesaurus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thesaurus_entries_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation entry */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the word that is being translated */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the translation */,
  "translated_word" TEXT /* The translated form of the word */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the translation (e.g., dictionary, manual) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the translation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the translation (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)
